evidence_summary: Apache access log contains entries with raw IPs (198.51.100.44, 198.51.100.45, 203.0.113.22), a User-Agent string 'zgrab/0.x', and a URI path /api/checkout/paypal/token. Operator asks curator to extract and normalize all IOCs (IPs, user-agent, URI pattern) into a deduped JSON list with type labels.
